ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Support email address of the manufacturer */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "router_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each router model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the router */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the router model */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Hardware version of the router */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the router model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_router_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the language (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ipv6_features" (
  "ipv6_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IPv6 feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the IPv6 feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IPv6 feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ipv6_feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_versions" (
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the firmware */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "ipv6_feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IPv6 feature */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the firmware version */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_versions_ipv6_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("ipv6_feature_id") REFERENCES ipv6_features ("ipv6_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_versions_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "router_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the router model */,
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware version */,
  "compatibility_status" TEXT /* Status of the compatibility (e.g., compatible, incompatible, unknown) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compatibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_router_compatibility_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES router_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_router_compatibility_firmware_id FOREIGN KEY ("firmware_id") REFERENCES firmware_versions ("firmware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Download link for the firmware version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_firmware_id FOREIGN KEY ("firmware_id") REFERENCES firmware_versions ("firmware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, QA) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, firmware download) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware version */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date of the download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_downloads_firmware_id FOREIGN KEY ("firmware_id") REFERENCES firmware_versions ("firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware version */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review comments by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_ratings_firmware_id FOREIGN KEY ("firmware_id") REFERENCES firmware_versions ("firmware_id")
)
